form.formComment: Second-up. First start ran last in a small field at Randwick Kensington Super Mdn-Sw on June 25 over 1100m, slow going 9 len behind Stardeel with 59kg at $4.20. Went for a break before returning won by 1.3 len at this track Cg&E Mdn March 26 over 1100m in soft going defeating Smoke 'N' Darts with 59kg at $6. Back in great shape and can measure up in this tougher contest.

form.formComment: At the latest run came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at Newcastle Prov Cl1 on March 31 over 1250m, 0.8 len behind Lightning Glory with 58.5kg at $26. The start before that 4th of 7 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cl1 on March 23 over 1200m, slow going 4.5 len behind Autumn King carrying 61kg at $11. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when favourite; won by a nose at Randwick Kensington Super Mdn-Sw January 14 over 1150m in soft going defeating Let's Go Barbie with 55.5kg at $2.20. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Excellent debut winner and can remain undefeated first-up.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at this track Cg&E Bm64 October 23 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Inoue with 56.5kg at $3.90. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.3 len Newcastle Mdn October 2 over 900m defeating Uncle Barry with 56.5kg at $1.50. Resumes with the two good trials and sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Newcastle Cl1 on March 31 over 900m, nose behind Confidentiality carrying 56kg at $1.90. The race before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 10 at this track Mid Bm64 on March 7 over 1100m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Cavallo Park carrying 54.5kg at $6. Claim helps again and don't underestimate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in on jumping and made contact with All Saints.

form.formComment: At the latest run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Wyong Mid Cl1 on April 4 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind He's Cool carrying 55kg at $4.60. The run before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.25 len at this track Prov Mdn March 17 over 1100m defeating Arato carrying 57kg at $2.90. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Kembla Grange Bm64 October 25 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Couples Retreat with 55kg at $3.80. When resuming last campaign fifth of 13 at Kembla Grange Bm64 September 18 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Whatalegacy with 55kg at $2.50. Back for her third prep and ready to go with the one trial placing.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 7 at Newcastle Cl1 on March 31 over 900m, 3 len behind Confidentiality with 57kg at $8. The race before that second last of 7 at this track Cl1 on February 19 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Gambler with 56kg at $5.50. Making headway. Key runner who can lift over this trip.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover for the majority of the race.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 8 at Kembla Grange Mid Cl1 on March 21 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Fine Wine with 56.5kg at $5. Previously second-up won by a nose at Kembla Grange Prov Mdn September 18 over 1000m defeating Uncle Barry with 58kg at $3.60. No easier this time and happy to leave out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered when crowded for room on jumping by Triple Triple and Nymphadora.
Crowded and taken out on jumping between Ex Wife and Star Venture.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Port Macquarie F&M Cl1 on March 24 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Shoutaboutit with 58kg at $7. The run before that sat on the pace when 3rd of 7 at Kembla Grange Prov Cl1 on March 3 over 1000m, in the wet; 0.6 len behind Ride The River with 53.5kg at $8.50. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. Shapes as a strong top-three chance with the sharp weight drop.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure down the straight.
